question: Please give the name of the race held on the circuits in Germany.
evidence: Germany is a name of country;
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.name FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.country = 'Germany'

full.predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.name 
FROM races r 
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId 
WHERE c.country = 'Germany'

bm25.predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.name 
FROM races r 
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId 
WHERE c.country = 'Germany'

embedding.predicted_sql: SELECT r.name FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE c.country = 'Germany'

hybrid.predicted_sql: SELECT DISTINCT r.name FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE c.country = 'Germany'

question: State the race and year of race in which Michael Schumacher had his fastest lap.
evidence: fastest lap refers to min(milliseconds); Alex Yoong refers to the full name of the driver; Full name of the driver refers to drivers.forename and drivers.surname;
gold_sql: SELECT T1.name, T1.year FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Michael' AND T3.surname = 'Schumacher' ORDER BY T2.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

full.predicted_sql:
SELECT r.name, r.year 
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY res.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1

bm25.predicted_sql:
SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1

embedding.predicted_sql:
SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1

hybrid.predicted_sql:
SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
AND res.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(res2.milliseconds)
    FROM results res2
    JOIN drivers d2 ON res2.driverId = d2.driverId
    WHERE d2.forename = 'Michael' AND d2.surname = 'Schumacher'
    AND res2.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
)

question: Please calculate the race completion percentage of Japanese drivers from 2007 to 2009.
evidence: from 2007 to 2009 refers to year between 2007 and 2009; race completion refers to time is not null; percentage = Divide(COUNT(DriverID where time is not null and year between 2007 and 2009),Count (DriverID where year between 2007 and 2009))*100;
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.time IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.raceId) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 on T1.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T3.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T2.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

full.predicted_sql:
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(r.resultId) AS completion_percentage
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese'
AND ra.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

bm25.predicted_sql:
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN lt.time IS NOT NULL THEN lt."driverId" END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(lt."driverId")
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt."raceId" = r."raceId"
JOIN drivers d ON lt."driverId" = d."driverId"
WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese'
AND r.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

embedding.predicted_sql:
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN res.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM results res
JOIN races ra ON res.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese'
AND ra.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

hybrid.predicted_sql:
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN lt.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(lt."driverId") AS completion_percentage
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt."driverId" = d."driverId"
JOIN races r ON lt."raceId" = r."raceId"
WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese'
AND r.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009
